overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city waterfront at night. The player moves along a wet promenade lined with palm trees and neon signs, passing pedestrians in a futuristic urban environment with heavy atmospheric rain and teal-green lighting. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring the distinctive Night City architecture and weather effects.

agents.ego_description: walking past a brightly lit 24/7 convenience store with cyan neon signage, moving along the wet waterfront sidewalk

entered.detail: storefront with bright cyan neon signage and metal security shutters
tall pole with warm orange light illuminating the rain
metal safety railing along the water's edge
silhouetted palm trees visible through the rain and fog along the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk street at night, with the camera moving past a neon-lit convenience store. The wet pavement reflects the cyan and orange lights, while palm trees are visible in the foggy distance beyond the waterfront railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with city views

camera pans left to view the water and palm trees before continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking along the promenade passing pedestrians, with a large building on the left and open water on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light-colored coat walking toward camera along the building wall
pedestrian standing near the waterfront railing looking out at the water

entered.detail: dark brutalist office building with illuminated windows rising several stories
large floating holographic advertisement glowing pink and white in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera moves past the convenience store corner, revealing a wide waterfront promenade. A large concrete building dominates the left side while a pink holographic billboard floats in the distance. Pedestrians appear, walking along the rain-slicked path, and the waterfront railing shifts to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: straight waterfront promenade with distant megastructure

events.description: tall neon-lit skyscraper becomes clearly visible through the rain and fog

agents.ego_description: continuing along the straight promenade, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding an umbrella walking toward camera along the railing
pedestrian in dark clothing walking away from camera down the path

entered.detail: massive tower with vertical neon signage and illuminated windows piercing through the storm clouds

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the open waterfront stretch with the large building now behind. A massive neon-lit skyscraper dominates the distant right skyline, growing larger as the camera approaches. Palm trees line the right side of the path, and pedestrians with umbrellas pass by in the heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade approaching covered shelter structures

events.description: approaching triangular covered shelter structures with slanted roofs

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distant shelter structures, maintaining steady pace along the rain-soaked path

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red coat walking toward camera through the rain

entered.detail: modern architectural shelters with angled roofs and vertical supports along the promenade

segments.scene_description: The final stretch continues along the waterfront with the neon skyscraper now prominent on the right. The camera approaches a series of modern covered shelter structures ahead. The rain intensifies the atmospheric haze, and street lamps recede into the distance behind as the path continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked cyberpunk waterfront that transitions from a narrow neon-lit street into a wide, atmospheric urban promenade. It begins by gliding past a convenience store where cyan and orange lights reflect off the wet pavement, with foggy palm trees visible beyond a nearby railing. As the camera rounds the corner, the view expands to reveal a broad walkway flanked by a massive concrete building and a floating pink holographic billboard, while pedestrians begin to appear through the rain. The scene then shifts toward the open waterfront, where the camera moves past umbrella-carrying pedestrians and lining palm trees as a colossal neon skyscraper grows increasingly dominant on the distant skyline. Finally, the path leads toward a series of modern covered shelters, with the atmospheric haze intensifying as the street lamps recede into the distance.
